[REWRITE dry-run] fn bubble_sort bubble → insertion
-    let n = len(a)
-    let mut i = 0
-    while i < n - 1 {
-        let mut j = 0
-        while j < n - i - 1 {
-            if a[j] > a[j + 1] {
-                swap(a, j, j + 1)
-            }
-            j = j + 1
-        }
-        i = i + 1
-    }
-    return a
+    // @rewritten_by: algorithm_swap (bubble → insertion, S-3b dry-run)
+    let n = len(a)
+    let mut i = 1
+    while i < n {
+        let key = a[i]
+        let mut j = i
+        while j > 0 && a[j - 1] > key {
+            a[j] = a[j - 1]
+            j = j - 1
+        }
+        a[j] = key
+        i = i + 1
+    }
+    return a
